title: Bitter Dense Slovakian Clam Crumble
description: A kid-friendly and sugar-free-friendly bitter dense dish featuring clams that is perfect for the whole family to enjoy as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse clams and pat dry.
In a medium mixing bowl, combine clams with potato flour, sugar-free sweetener, butter, all-purpose flour, and chopped parsley. Mix well until clams are fully coated.
Transfer the mixture onto an oven-safe plate or baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Spread evenly in one layer.
Bake for 20 minutes or until firm to touch but still slightly chewy when pressed lightly.
Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
